svg.title: PS4 Hackathon Build Workflow
svg.desc: Complete workflow from tech stack to implementation phases for PDF chatbot hackathon project

g.text: 1. On keyup (debounce 300ms) → send partial query to /autocomplete
2. Backend: embed partial query → similarity search chunks → extract question patterns
3. Claude generates 3 question completions grounded in those chunks
"Summarize section 3 → insert page 1": Claude reads chunks → generates summary → PyMuPDF inserts
Library: reportlab (create new page) + PyMuPDF (merge) → return updated PDF download
Parse intent with Claude function calling → route to correct edit action
